title_cn: 亚马逊 Prime Day 在线总支出超过 Adob​​e 预估
summary: Online spending across all retailers in the US hit $26.4 billion during Amazon.com Inc.’s annual Prime Day sale, according to Adobe Inc., narrowly beating the firm’s earlier estimate of $26.3 billion.

title_cn: 英国《金融时报》称，诊断公司 QuidelOrtho 正在考虑出售检测设备
summary: Diagnostics firm QuidelOrtho Corp is looking to sell its point-of-care testing unit at a valuation of $1.5 billion, the Financial Times reported.

title: New Zealand Dollar Faces Tough Third Quarter on Growth Headwinds
title_cn: 新西兰元第三季度因增长阻力而面临艰难
summary: New Zealand’s dollar is facing a subdued third quarter as a resurgent greenback and the lingering effects of the Iran war’s energy shock drag on the domestic recovery.

title: Bond Heavyweights Target a Market Sweet Spot for New Warsh Era
title_cn: 债券重量级人物瞄准新沃什时代的市场最佳点
summary: Some of the biggest bond managers are zeroing in on one specific area of the market as the best place to ride out the early days of the Kevin Warsh era.

title: Warsh Makes Debut on the Global Stage With the Class of 2008
title_cn: Warsh 与 2008 届毕业生一起首次亮相全球舞台
summary: Kevin Warsh and three other veterans of the 2008 global financial crisis will share a stage this week as the danger of renewed turmoil continues to haunt central bankers.

title: Bloomberg This Weekend 6/28/2026
title_cn: 彭博社本周末 2026 年 6 月 28 日
summary: The news doesn’t stop when markets close. Hosts David Gura, Christina Ruffini and Lisa Mateo bring clarity, context and a bit of humor to the weekend’s biggest headlines, LIVE from New York. Joined by Center for Strategic & International Studies Senior Advisor and Fmr. Vice Foreign Minister of Panama Carlos Ruiz-Hernandez, Fmr. Deputy National Security Advisor Ben Rhodes, Congressional Nominee NY-17 Cait Conley, Fmr. UN Ambassador and Fmr. USAID Ambassador Samantha Power, The Council for Economic Education Senior Advocacy Director Leslie Finnan, Brooklyn Preparatory High School Financial Literacy Educator and Assistant Principal Diana Isern and Boston Globe Social Video Journalist Emily Sweeney. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Venezuela’s Machado Attempts Fast Return Amid Quake Response
title_cn: 委内瑞拉马查多试图在地震响应中快速返回
summary: Venezuela’s opposition leader María Corina Machado is working to return to the country as soon as possible, according to people with direct knowledge of her plans, a move that could reshape the political landscape as acting President Delcy Rodríguez struggles to respond to the nation’s worst natural disaster in decades.

title: World Cup Fever Energizes Boston Ahead of Knockout Stage
title_cn: 世界杯热潮让波士顿在淘汰赛阶段充满活力
summary: From Scotts to Haitians, Boston has been a hotspot for memorable moments during the FIFA World Cup. Boston Globe Social Video Journalist Emily Sweeney joins Bloomberg This Weekend and discusses with hosts David Gura, Christina Ruffini and Lisa Mateo vibrant atmosphere and community spirit that has taken over the city. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Uphill Battle Facing Revitalizing Dulles Airport
title_cn: 振兴杜勒斯机场面临艰巨的战斗
summary: Recently President Trump added Dulles Airport located in Washington DC to his list of properties he hopes to remake in his own image. Bloomberg CityLab staff writer Kriston Capps joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to explain the many issues Dulles airport currently struggles from and who may be the ones to pay for such an overhaul renovation. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: High Schools Emphasizing Personal Finance Education
title_cn: 高中强调个人理财教育
summary: 39 US states now require students to complete a personal finance course to graduate, up from just one state in 1998. Senior Advocacy Director for the Council for Economic Education Leslie Finnan explains that students who take these courses tend to make better financial decisions, have higher credit scores, and manage student loans more responsibly. Bloomberg This Weekend's Lisa Mateo also spoke with Brooklyn Preparatory High School Assistant Principal and Financial Literacy Educator Diana Isern about the curriculum of a modern finance class. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Aramco Helicopter Crash in Ras Tanura Kills All 14 on Board
title_cn: 沙特阿美直升机在 Ras Tanura 坠毁，机上 14 人全部遇难
summary: A helicopter operated by Saudi Aramco crashed Sunday in the energy heartland of Ras Tanura, killing all 14 passengers on board.

title: Can USMCA Survive Trump’s Second Term?
title_cn: USMCA 能否在特朗普第二任期内幸存？
summary: As Canada, Mexico, and the United States begin reviewing the USMCA trade pact, former diplomats and trade negotiators say the stakes extend far beyond tariffs. Former Canadian Ambassador Kirsten Hillman, former Mexican Ambassador Gerónimo Gutiérrez, and former US trade counsel Kelly Ann Shaw argue that the agreement now underpins everything from supply chains and agriculture to intellectual property and investment. While disagreements remain over autos, China, and industrial policy, all three say the bigger question is whether North America can strengthen its economic integration while adapting to a rapidly changing geopolitical environment. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Leverage That Fueled US Stock Rally Becomes a Growing Concern
title_cn: 推动美股上涨的杠杆因素日益受到关注
summary: The leverage that helped fuel the US stock rally is now becoming an increasing source of unease.

title: Supreme Court Faces High-Stakes Week
title_cn: 最高法院面临高风险周
summary: Bloomberg News Supreme Court reporter Greg Stohr joins Bloomberg This Weekend and says the justices are expected to issue rulings this week in two closely watched cases involving President Donald Trump: his attempt to remove Federal Reserve Governor Lisa Cook and his executive order restricting birthright citizenship. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: By The Way: Interesting Headlines You May Have Missed
title_cn: 顺便说一句：您可能错过的有趣头条新闻
summary: Hacky sack makes a comeback, the US Men's National soccer team plays with some puppies, Doctors vs Podcast advise, and Robotaxi rules easing. Lisa Mateo, Christina Ruffini and David Gura dive into the headlines you may have missed on Bloomberg This Weekend. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hawkish Fed Throws Down Challenge for Emerging-Market Bond Rally
title_cn: 鹰派美联储放弃对新兴市场债券反弹的挑战
summary: Just when it looked like emerging-market bonds would catch a break from falling energy prices, along came Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh to spoil the party.

title: Fmr. Deputy National Security Advisor Warns Trump Rhetoric Risks Iran Talks
title_cn: 先生。副国家安全顾问警告特朗普言论给伊朗谈判带来风险
summary: While the Iran ceasefire remains intact despite recent exchanges of fire, Former Deputy National Security Advisor Ben Rhodes warned it could unravel if tit-for-tat strikes escalate or hardliners on either side gain the upper hand. He argued to hosts of Bloomberg This Weekend David Gura and Christina Ruffini that President Donald Trump's public threats and rhetoric risk undermining negotiations by strengthening Iranian hardliners and making it harder for negotiators to secure a nuclear agreement. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Why the US Needs its Neighbors for Energy
title_cn: 为什么美国需要邻国提供能源
summary: Unlike autos or agriculture, North America’s energy trade does not function as a single, integrated three-country system. Instead, it operates through two powerful bilateral relationships: Canadian oil flowing south into US refineries and American natural gas powering Mexico’s economy. Howard Energy Partners CEO Mike Howard says roughly 70% of Mexico’s energy comes from the United States, while former Canada Energy Regulator CEO Gitane De Silva notes that about 60% of US oil imports originate in Canada. As USMCA negotiations approach, energy executives, regulators, and policy experts largely agree on one thing: the current arrangement works remarkably well, and the best outcome may be to leave it largely untouched. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Panama Canal Sees Revenue Boost Amid Iran Conflict
title_cn: 伊朗冲突期间巴拿马运河收入增加
summary: The ongoing conflict involving Iran has indirectly benefited Panama as more ships seeking alternative routes to transport commodities globally, following disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz. Former vice foreign minister of Panama and senior adviser at the Center for Strategic Studies Carlos Ruiz-Hernandez joins Bloomberg This Weekend and explains to hosts David Gura and Christina Ruffini how the Panama Canal Authority is proactively managing the surge by anticipating risks and preparing to handle near-capacity traffic. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Europe’s Hunt for AI Stocks Leads to Power Suppliers and Banks
title_cn: 欧洲对人工智能股票的追逐导致电力供应商和银行
summary: Investors who want additional exposure to artificial intelligence in Europe are getting creative, searching out companies that enable the technology or stand to benefit from it as the usual suspects get more pricey.

title: AI Bust Risks Ripple Effects From Growth to Credit, BIS Says
title_cn: 国际清算银行表示，人工智能泡沫破灭可能会对经济增长和信贷产生连锁反应
summary: An artificial-intelligence bust, inflation and fiscal stress are among the most alarming threats to global prosperity at present, the Bank for International Settlements warned.

title: Israel Weighs US IPO for Major State-Owned Defense Firms
title_cn: 以色列考虑让主要国有国防公司在美国首次公开募股
summary: Israel is considering listing state-owned defense giants Israel Aerospace Industries Ltd. and Rafael Advanced Defense Systems Ltd. in the US to potentially avoid stricter disclosure obligations in the local market.

title: Sydney Home Auction Activity Weakens as Costs, Tax Changes Weigh
title_cn: 由于成本和税收变化的影响，悉尼房屋拍卖活动减弱
summary: Sydney posted its weakest weekend home auction clearance rate in more than six years as higher interest rates and property tax changes dampen activity and weigh on prices, after years of rapid gains.

title: Burnham’s Rise Revives Talk of War Bonds to Fund the UK Military
title_cn: 伯纳姆的崛起重新引发了战争债券为英国军队提供资金的讨论
summary: Andy Burnham, Britain’s soon-to-be prime minister, wants an array of bold new policies to attract voters who have grown tired of a Labour government mired in indecision and political backbiting. One idea is the issuing of war bonds.

title: Tech Equity Sales Renew AI Debt-Binge Worries
title_cn: 科技股销售再次引发人工智能债务狂潮担忧
summary: Tech companies are selling stock like it’s the dot-com boom, and some investors fear that’s a bad sign for bondholders.

title: Bloomberg This Weekend 6/27/2026
title_cn: 彭博社本周末 2026 年 6 月 27 日
summary: The news doesn’t stop when markets close. Hosts David Gura, Christina Ruffini and Lisa Mateo bring clarity, context and a bit of humor to the weekend’s biggest headlines, LIVE from New York. Joined by Fmr. UN Ambassador and Fmr. USAID Administrator Samantha Power and Oklahoma Senator Alan Armstrong. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Aid Groups Flock to Venezuela In Search-and-Rescue Frenzy
title_cn: 援助团体涌向委内瑞拉疯狂搜救
summary: Two of the US military ships used in a blockade meant to pressure Nicolás Maduro have headed back toward Venezuela, this time with rescue teams, equipment and medical aid after devastating twin earthquakes struck the country this week.

title: Pointed News Quiz | Reddit, Music, YA Novels
title_cn: 针对性新闻测验 | Reddit、音乐、青少年小说
summary: David Gura, Christina Ruffini, and Lisa Mateo of “Bloomberg This Weekend” play Pointed! Wager your points, leverage your bets and answer wisely. A new quiz is available to play each week on Bloomberg.com  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ECB’s Schnabel Sees Upside Inflation Risks Despite Peace Deal
title_cn: 欧洲央行行长施纳贝尔认为，尽管达成和平协议，通胀仍存在上行风险
summary: European Central Bank Executive Board member Isabel Schnabel warned that price pressures could turn out stronger than anticipated even as a US-Iran peace deal reopens the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Sen. Armstrong: Permitting Is Key to Lower Energy Costs
title_cn: 参议员阿姆斯特朗：许可是降低能源成本的关键
summary: Senator Alan Armstrong (R-Oklahoma) joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend and says permitting reform—not additional federal spending—is the most effective way to lower housing and energy costs, arguing regulatory delays have created infrastructure bottlenecks that drive up prices for consumers. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: America’s Farmers Need USMCA More Than Ever
title_cn: 美国农民比以往任何时候都更需要 USMCA
summary: For many American farmers, Canada and Mexico have become indispensable export markets at a time when trade disputes, weak commodity prices, and rising costs are already straining the agricultural economy. Iowa farmer Stu Swanson says many producers are operating on dwindling hope as financial  pressures mount. CoBank CEO Tom Halverson argues that trade deals have helped US  exports to Canada and Mexico grow roughly 600% since NAFTA’s creation. As negotiations begin, farmers are less focused on expanding the agreement than on preserving certainty and avoiding new disruptions that could further weaken an already fragile farm economy.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Soaring iPad, Xbox Prices Reveal Pain of Memory Chip Mess
title_cn: iPad、Xbox 价格飙升揭示了内存芯片混乱的痛苦
summary: Within a span of five hours Thursday, Apple Inc. and Microsoft Corp. hiked the prices for such popular products as Xbox video-game consoles, Macs and iPads.

title: AI Startup Firmus to Build Indonesia Data Center With Nvidia
title_cn: AI 初创公司 Firmus 将与 Nvidia 合作建设印度尼西亚数据中心
summary: Firmus Technologies Pty Ltd. will build its first data center project in Indonesia as part of a partnership with US chip giant Nvidia Corp., which the Australian artificial intelligence infrastructure firm said is expected to win it as much as $30 billion in committed offtake agreements in its first six years.

title: How Robotaxis Are Making Headway, Glitches and All
title_cn: 机器人出租车如何取得进展、出现故障等等
summary: It’s one of those technologies that were always around the corner but never arrived. Now it has, kind of...

title: Apple’s Sweeping Price Increases Bring Home the Costs of the AI Era
title_cn: 苹果大幅涨价让人们认识到人工智能时代的成本
summary: The latest on the smart glasses competition.

title: Austria Lobbies EU to Host Anthropic After US Access Curbs
title_cn: 奥地利游说欧盟在美国限制准入后主办人类活动
summary: Austria is pushing the European Union to consider hosting Anthropic PBC within its borders to counter US efforts to block foreigners from using its most advanced artificial-intelligence models.

title: Google Caps Meta’s Use of Gemini AI, Financial Times Reports
title_cn: 据《金融时报》报道，谷歌限制了 Meta 对 Gemini AI 的使用
summary: Google has placed limits on Meta Platforms Inc.’s use of its Gemini artificial intelligence models because it could not provide as much computing capacity as the social media company wanted, according to the Financial Times.

title: OpenAI Hires Uber’s Prabhjeet Singh to Lead India Operations
title_cn: OpenAI 聘请 Uber 的 Prabhjeet Singh 领导印度业务
summary: OpenAI appointed Uber Technologies Inc.’s former India and South Asia President Prabhjeet Singh as its managing director for the country, deepening its investment in one of its fastest-growing markets.

title: Tencent Trials TenPayGo Pay App as Foreign Visits to China Rise
title_cn: 随着访华外国游客增多，腾讯试用财付通支付应用程序
summary: Tencent Holdings Ltd. is testing an app aimed at helping overseas visitors navigate daily life in China, Jiemian News reported on Sunday.

title: AI Fever Powers HK Share Sales Through Hurdles to Five-Year High
title_cn: 人工智能热潮推动港股销售冲破五年新高
summary: Hong Kong share sales surged to a five-year high in the first half of 2026 as investor enthusiasm around the artificial intelligence boom overpowered the drag of a sluggish equity market and regulatory headwinds.

title: California Leaders Agree to $351 Billion Budget, Software Tax
title_cn: 加州领导人同意 3510 亿美元的软件税预算
summary: California Governor Gavin Newsom and top Democratic legislators have reached an agreement on a $351.7 billion state budget that will be bolstered in part by a newly proposed tax on digital software sales.

title: AI’s Energy Crunch Has Investors Searching for Next IPO Winners
title_cn: 人工智能的能源紧缩让投资者寻找下一个 IPO 获胜者
summary: The artificial intelligence boom has a power problem, and Wall Street is betting billions on companies that promise to solve it — even if some of the technology hasn’t been fully developed yet.

title: Australia to Strengthen Enforcement of Under-16 Social Media Ban
title_cn: 澳大利亚将加强对 16 岁以下社交媒体禁令的执行
summary: Australia will grant its online safety watchdog more powers and increase the maximum penalty for breaches of its world-first social media ban, with Prime Minister Anthony Albanese saying big tech companies are not doing enough to comply.

title: Apple Seeks US Approval to Buy Chips From Blacklisted CXMT: FT
title_cn: 苹果寻求美国批准从列入黑名单的CXMT购买芯片：FT
summary: Apple Inc. is pressing the White House for approval to purchase memory chips from a blacklisted Chinese company as it grapples to rein in chip costs, the Financial Times reported on Saturday.

title: China’s Industrial Profit Gains Dip in Sign of Weakness
title_cn: 中国工业利润增幅出现疲软迹象
summary: The increase in China’s industrial profits softened for the first time since November, suggesting that strong exports and price gains failed to offset the drag from tepid domestic demand.

title: Trustpilot Teams Up With Shopify to Connect Reviews to Stores
title_cn: Trustpilot 与 Shopify 合作将评论与商店联系起来
summary: Trustpilot Group Plc partnered with e-commerce giant Shopify Inc. to allow merchants to showcase and manage Trustpilot reviews directly on their online stores.

title: Anthropic’s Mythos 5 AI Model Cleared by US for Wider Use
title_cn: Anthropic 的 Mythos 5 人工智能模型获得美国批准以供更广泛使用
summary: Anthropic PBC won US approval to restore some access to its powerful Mythos 5 artificial intelligence model, after resolving Trump administration concerns about the technology’s potential threats to national security.

title: AI Is Already Reshaping US Politics at Every Level
title_cn: 人工智能已经在各个层面重塑美国政治
summary: From data center backlash to boundless cash from tech billionaires and concerns about deepfaked campaign ads, AI is everywhere in the 2026 US elections.

title: S&P 500 Halts Four-Day Drop To End Jittery Week | The Close 6/26/2026
title_cn: 标准普尔 500 指数停止四天下跌，结束紧张不安的一周收盘价 2026 年 6 月 26 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Sony Pictures Entertainment Motion Picture Group Chairman & CEO, Tom Rothman;  Former Pro Tennis Player, Caroline Wozniacki;   Earn Your Leisure Co-Founders and CEOs, Rashad Bilal & Troy Millings;  Forum AI Co-Founder & CEO, Campbell Brown;  RockCreek Founder & CEO, Afsaneh Beschloss;   Invesco Alterative ETF Strategy Head, Kathy Kriskey;  Franklin Templeton Head of Global Index Portfolio MGMT, Dina Ting;  and Morningstar Research Senior Equity Analyst, David Swartz (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Forum AI CEO on Pitfalls With AI in Politics
title_cn: 论坛人工智能首席执行官谈人工智能在政治中的陷阱
summary: Campbell Brown, Co-Founder and CEO of Forum AI, discusses the need for AI companies to open up for scrutiny. She discusses with Romaine Bostick on Bloomberg's "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sony Pictures’ Tom Rothman: Summer Box Office Is Roaring
title_cn: 索尼影业的汤姆·罗斯曼：夏季票房飙升
summary: Tom Rothman, Chairman and CEO of Sony Pictures Entertainment Motion Pictures Group, discusses the future of Hollywood and how studios can create cultural pressure to keep theater seats filled. He joins Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld on set.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX, Charter Discussed Mobile Phone Partnership in US
title_cn: SpaceX 与 Charter 讨论了在美国的手机合作伙伴关系
summary: SpaceX and Charter Communications Inc. have held executive-level talks about partnering on a consumer mobile phone offering, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Anthropic Moves Toward Deal With US to Lift Curbs on AI Models
title_cn: Anthropic 正与美国达成协议，取消对人工智能模型的限制
summary: Anthropic PBC and the Trump administration are moving closer to an agreement that would lift US restrictions on the company’s top two artificial intelligence models after weeks of talks between the two sides over security of the systems, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: OpenAI Limits Release of New Model Under Pressure From US
title_cn: OpenAI 迫于美国压力限制新模型发布
summary: OpenAI is rolling out a preview version of a more capable new artificial intelligence model to select partners before making it available more widely in the coming weeks, following pressure from the Trump administration to stagger the release.

title: Unremarkable Economy, Remarkable Rally: Skelly
title_cn: 经济平淡，反弹引人注目：斯凯利
summary: Dan Skelly, managing director and head of the equity model portfolio team at Morgan Stanley Wealth Management, joins Lisa Mateo and Tom Keene on "Bloomberg Money." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump’s U-Turn on Iran Sanctions Would Unravel Decades of Curbs
title_cn: 特朗普对伊朗制裁的大转变将瓦解数十年的限制
summary: The Trump administration’s effort to unwind decades of sanctions as part of a deal to end the war with Iran has created a head-spinning situation for governments, banks and other companies as they contemplate a shifting patchwork of new permissions and old restrictions.

title: US, Iran Trade Fresh Attacks That Put Ceasefire Under Strain
title_cn: 美国和伊朗再次发动袭击，导致停火紧张
summary: The US and Iran traded attacks targeting each other’s military infrastructure, signaling no let up in several days of escalation that are straining a ceasefire underpinning peace talks.

title: Trump Shifts Messaging from Iran to Economy
title_cn: 特朗普将信息从伊朗转向经济
summary: Bloomberg News White House Correspondent Jeff Mason joins Bloomberg This Weekend and explains that President Donald Trump is increasingly shifting his public message from the conflict with Iran back to the economy, highlighting lower oil and gasoline prices as the White House seeks to refocus on voters' economic concerns ahead of the midterms. And yet, a recent report has come out that a missed intelligence update and disconnected Pentagon databases contributed to a deadly strike on a former Iranian military site that had been converted into an elementary school Bloomberg News Technology & National Security Reporter Katrina Manson explains to hosts David Gura and Christina Ruffini. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NY Democratic Nominee Cait Conley: Voters Reject Dysfunction
title_cn: 纽约民主党候选人凯特·康利：选民拒绝功能障碍
summary:
Democratic Nominee for New York 17th House District Cait Conley joins Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss the upcoming general election against incumbent Republican Congressman Mike Lawler. 

 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Supreme Court Leaves Trump’s Fed, Citizenship Gambits for Last
title_cn: 最高法院将特朗普的美联储和公民权策略留到最后
summary: President Donald Trump is on the brink of learning whether the US Supreme Court will bless two of his most audacious gambits, his bids to oust a Federal Reserve governor and roll back automatic birthright citizenship.

title: Mamdani Says Primaries Show Voters Want a New Kind of Politics
title_cn: 马姆达尼表示，初选表明选民想要一种新型政治
summary: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani said he believes Tuesday’s state primaries, where the slate of progressive candidates won, show that American voters are looking for a “new kind of politics.”

title: Ugandan Army Chief Shuts Down Main Independent Media Group
title_cn: 乌干达陆军参谋长关闭主要独立媒体集团
summary: Uganda’s army chief, the son of long-serving president Yoweri Museveni, ordered the country’s main independent media group to halt operations, after accusing it of biased reporting.

title: Beijing Tower Plane Crash Shows Security Gap Near Xi’s Compound
title_cn: 北京塔空难显示习近平官邸附近存在安全漏洞
summary: A small plane that crashed into the Beijing’s tallest skyscraper on Friday has exposed a vulnerability in the Chinese capital’s controlled airspace, prompting questions over safeguards around politically sensitive locations.

title: Strategist Sees WTI Falling to $40 a Barrel
title_cn: 策略师预计 WTI 跌至每桶 40 美元
summary: Rising oil prices are accelerating a supply glut in the Western Hemisphere, Bloomberg Intelligence Senior Commodity Strategist Mike McGlone argues that growing production and improving technology could drive WTI crude down to $40 a barrel. McGlone explains to David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend that gas prices are likely to be lower by the midterm elections, but warns that such declines have often coincided with weakness in the stock market. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Singapore’s Main Opposition Keeps Singh as Chief After Vote
title_cn: 新加坡主要反对党投票后维持辛格为首席
summary: Singapore’s main opposition Workers’ Party retained Pritam Singh as secretary-general following a special vote among cadres to back the party chief despite his recent legal convictions for lying to a parliamentary committee.

title: Ukraine Targets Russian Refineries in Fresh Drone Strikes
title_cn: 乌克兰新一轮无人机袭击瞄准俄罗斯炼油厂
summary: Ukraine struck the Slavyansk-na-Kubani oil refinery in Russia’s Krasnodar region and “reached” a refinery in the Yaroslavl region overnight, President Volodymyr Zelenskyy said on X, calling the attacks part of Kyiv’s “long-range sanctions” campaign against Moscow.

title: Kushner-Linked Protests Reveal Depth of Anger at Albanian Leaders
title_cn: 与库什纳相关的抗议揭示了对阿尔巴尼亚领导人的愤怒之深
summary: When Edi Rama went on national television to try to assuage protesters calling for his resignation, he managed only to stoke their anger. The Albanian prime minister grew visibly irritated by the anchor who asked why, after 13 years in power, his government had still not managed to provide reliable water and electricity services for the country’s population of 2.4 million.

title: Pakistan Forces Kill Three Militants in Karachi Camp Attack
title_cn: 巴基斯坦军队在卡拉奇营地袭击中击毙三名武装分子
summary: Pakistan’s security forces have foiled a militant attack on a camp in Karachi Saturday night, killing three assailants and capturing one injured attacker, according to government statements.

title: India Urges Kailash Pilgrims to Have All China Travel Documents
title_cn: 印度敦促冈仁波齐朝圣者持有所有中国旅行证件
summary: India advised citizens who are planning to undertake the Kailash Manasarovar Yatra pilgrimage in Tibet to ensure they have all the required Chinese visas and entry permits before beginning their journey, after reports of pilgrims stranded in Nepal awaiting documentation.

title: Letlow Wins Louisiana GOP Senate Primary, DDHQ Projects
title_cn: Letlow 赢得路易斯安那州共和党参议院初选、DDHQ 项目
summary: Julia Letlow is projected to win the Republican Senate primary in Louisiana, according to DDHQ.

title: US Launches Fresh Strikes on Iran Targets After Drone Hits
title_cn: 无人机袭击后美国对伊朗目标发动新一轮打击
summary: The US conducted a fresh round of strikes against multiple targets in Iran on Saturday, as a weekend of tit-for-tat attacks led both sides to claim violations of the ceasefire underpinning peace talks.

title: Trump Nominates Oklahoma Lawman as ICE Director
title_cn: 特朗普提名俄克拉荷马州执法人员为 ICE 局长
summary: President Donald Trump said he will nominate Lance Schroyer as director of US Immigration and Customs Enforcement, his first pick to hold the job permanently in his second term.

title: Milei’s Cabinet Chief Resigns Months After Private Jet Scandal
title_cn: 私人飞机丑闻数月后，米莱的内阁首长辞职
summary: Argentine President Javier Milei’s cabinet chief resigned Saturday after struggling for months to defuse corruption allegations, becoming the most high-profile departure since the libertarian leader took office.

title: US Conducts Fresh Round of Strikes in Iran After Second Ship Hit
title_cn: 第二艘船遭击中后，美国对伊朗进行新一轮打击
summary: The US conducted a fresh round of strikes against multiple targets in Iran on Saturday, the military said.

title: UK Prioritizes High-Speed Boats, Drones in Defense Funding Shift
title_cn: 英国在国防资金转移中优先考虑高速船和无人机
summary: The UK government will commit more than £500 million ($660 million) to transform its elite Commando Force, as it shifts defense spending to focus more on the front line and NATO security.

title: Serbia’s Vucic Says He Will Resign Soon to Help Party in Vote
title_cn: 塞尔维亚总统武契奇表示他将很快辞职以帮助该党投票
summary: Serbia President Aleksandar Vucic says he’ll quit his post within weeks to help his political party win early elections expected later this year, a move that would enable him to stay in power as prime minister if the party prevails in the ballot.

title: Venezuela Quakes Push Fragile Health System to the Brink
title_cn: 委内瑞拉地震将脆弱的卫生系统推向崩溃边缘
summary: Earthquake victims are overwhelming healthcare centers in Venezuela’s coastal state of La Guaira and beyond, pushing an already fragile health system past its limits.

title: AI Deepfake Political Ads Raise Concerns Ahead of Midterms
title_cn: 人工智能 Deepfake 政治广告在中期选举前引发担忧
summary: There is a growing prevalence of AI-generated deepfake political advertisements in the current midterm election cycle, including a deepfake resembling Billie Eilish, and a Texas Senate race ad showing a deepfake of Democrat James Talarico singing about transgender children. Bloomberg News corporate lobbying and influence reporter Emily Birnbaum discusses with hosts of Bloomberg This Weekend David Gura and Christina Ruffini the broader implications for election integrity, especially as the AI industry commits significant funding toward midterm elections. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Canada’s World Cup Dilemma: Visit LA to Cheer Team or Boycott US
title_cn: 加拿大的世界杯困境：前往洛杉矶为球队加油还是抵制美国
summary: Canadian soccer fans face a patriotic dilemma.

title: Ukraine Says It Targeted Russian Military Plant, Oil Station
title_cn: 乌克兰称其目标是俄罗斯军事工厂和油站
summary: Ukraine said it used Flamingo missiles to attack a military plant in Russia’s Volgograd and drones to strike an oil station in the Vladimir region close to Moscow, as Kyiv aims to bring Moscow to the negotiating table to end the war.

title: Tanker Struck in Hormuz as Navies Lift Threat Level to Ships
title_cn: 海军提升对船舶的威胁级别，油轮在霍尔木兹遇难
summary: A ship carrying Qatari oil was attacked in the Strait of Hormuz and naval authorities increased the threat level to shipping in the area, a fresh sign of rising tensions around the world’s most vital energy chokepoint.
